name: Command
description: A searchable command palette for quick actions. Combines an input with a filterable, keyboard-navigable list of actions.

filter.description: Custom filter function. Return 0 to hide, >0 to show.

whenNot: Form field selection (use Select or Combobox)
Search with complex result types (build custom)
guidelines: Compose inside Dialog for modal command palette usage
Use Command.Group to organize items by category
Use keywords prop for items that should match on aliases
Keep item labels short and action-oriented
accessibility: Keyboard navigation with ArrowUp/ArrowDown, Enter to select

examples.name: Default
examples.code: {}}>Open File {}}>Save Document {}}>Print No results found.

examples.name: Dialog Command Palette
examples.code:
<Dialog>
  <Dialog.Trigger asChild>
    <Button variant="secondary">Open Command Palette</Button>
  </Dialog.Trigger>
  <Dialog.Content size="sm">
    <Command>
      <Command.Input placeholder="Search commands..." />
      <Command.List>
        <Command.Group heading="Actions">
          <Command.Item onItemSelect={() => {}}>New File</Command.Item>
          <Command.Item onItemSelect={() => {}}>Open Recent</Command.Item>
        </Command.Group>
        <Command.Separator />
        <Command.Group heading="Settings">
          <Command.Item onItemSelect={() => {}}>Preferences</Command.Item>
          <Command.Item onItemSelect={() => {}}>Keyboard Shortcuts</Command.Item>
        </Command.Group>
        <Command.Empty>No results found.</Command.Empty>
      </Command.List>
    </Command>
  </Dialog.Content>
</Dialog>

examples.name: With Groups
examples.code: {}}>Calendar {}}>Calculator {}}>Profile {}}>Billing {}}> Team (coming soon) No results found.

examples.name: With Icons
examples.code: {}}> + New Document {}}> {'>'} Open Folder {}}> ? Search No results found.

relations.note: Compose inside Dialog for modal command palette
Command uses Listbox-like keyboard navigation internally
Use Combobox for form field selection with search

propsSummary: filter: (value, search, keywords?) => number - custom filter
loop: boolean - loop keyboard navigation (default: true)
Command.Item value: string - filter match value
Command.Item keywords: string[] - extra filter terms
Command.Item onItemSelect: (value, event) => void - selection handler
